{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321215742D1F78A7E96C8D8B3966D"}"},"total":121},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7547721154011841304","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书是很不错的种田流小说。不过主角并非是拿着天使的力量拳打公司脚踩帮派的硬派救世主。主角认为这个世界没救了的条件是人们失去反抗希望公司主宰一切的时候。
主角的救世是为底层的穷苦人希望，给他们食物，钱财，工具。教会他们什么是真正的活着然后带领他们反抗的角色。而不是手撕荒坂塔一个人淦整个世界的人","text_exts":[{"e":42,"s":39,"text":"救世主","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%95%91%E4%B8%96%E4%B8%BB&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774101462D8B3966D%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227547721154011841304%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227528063763602213913%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%95%91%E4%B8%96%E4%B8%BB%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1757343097,"group_id":"7528063763602213913","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"女人请你吃西瓜冰","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3YnHPGxGEtJllQFAHw5UuSuE1jaehKDe43QeL328Ntc","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/68122a9018f4401d92bfce85429ee9eb~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776616471&x-signature=LG29E66Y%2BDfs0L258de6tIaWmzc%3D","user_id":"2049928880460311","user_name":"缪女士的西瓜冰"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2049928880460311","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7528063763602213913","book_info":{"abstract":"突然有一天，飞天意面教普通教众周游被GOD选中了。
要他去赛博朋克2077的世界。
他的任务只有一个，那就是作为主的眼睛，以人类的视角来观察这个世界。
高情商：我就是摩西。
低情商：基层调研，要写报告的那种。
本来周游是拒绝的，谁想去号称战锤分锤的世界啊，但好在天堂是个正规企业，即使是实习期，也是会发放工资和福利的。
所以周游理所当然的同意了。
至于为什么天堂会选择自己，明明自己以前从不信鬼神。
某个大天使这样对周游说：
【主不在乎】
